title: ONYX Spears
body:
![ALL OF THE SPEARS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48bd6a485778375ea38c9f6311987a52bca45282.png)

Changes the default spear textures to slightly more agressive and sleek ones, only changes the spear textures, so it'll work fine with all your other resource packs!

Check Out My Store! - https://ascentmc.gumroad.com/

YT Channel - https://www.youtube.com/@ascent_mc
